title: alyssum umbellatum
intro: Alyssum umbellatum, also known as Madwort or Dog's Bane, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Alyssum umbellatum include its ability to treat digestive issues, alleviate anxiety and stress, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Alyssum umbellatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
